Farm Brewery · Tap Room · Event Space

Welcome to
7 Hamlets Brewing

A locally owned and operated farm brewery rooted in the history of Westmoreland, NY. Craft beer, great food, live music — come as you are.

Tap Room Hours View Menus

🍺 Tap Room Hours

Mon – TueClosed Wednesday4pm – 9pm Thursday3pm – 9pm Friday3pm – 9pm Saturday12pm – 9pm Sunday1pm – 6pm

🍔 Kitchen Hours

Mon – TueClosed Wednesday4pm – ~8pm Thursday3pm – ~8pm Friday3pm – ~8pm Saturday12pm – ~8pm Sunday1pm – ~5pm
What We Offer

More Than Just Great Beer

From craft brews named after Westmoreland's original hamlets to live music and a brand-new event space — there's always something happening here.

🍻

Craft Beer

Small-batch brews inspired by the 7 original hamlets of Westmoreland. From light lagers to bold stouts, brewed with passion since 2013.

🍔

Food & Kitchen

Fresh kitchen fare Wed–Sun. Plus the "Come and Get It" food truck rolling in with even more options.

🎵

Live Entertainment

Live music Thursdays & Sundays, Trivia Night every Wednesday. There's always a reason to stop by.

🎉

Event Space

NEW private event space available for parties & celebrations. Book for just $250 for 3 hours of exclusive access.

Weekly Lineup

Something Every Night

Wednesday

Trivia Night

6pm – 8pm · Tap room opens at 4pm

Thursday

Live Music

5:30pm – 8:30pm · Tap room opens at 3pm

Sunday

Live Music

2pm – 5pm · Tap room opens at 1pm
